subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, pure in spirit! Be thou a lady who seeketh her desire—that is, ever yearning for divine grace and heavenly bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز پاک جان الهی بانوی کام جو باش یعنی فیض یزدان طلب و فضل و احسان همیشه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
